title: Career Transition into Agentic AI
summary: Explains the credible progression from interaction engineering and digital transformation into ML-enabled systems and Agentic AI.
claims: The transition into Agentic AI is an evolution of Joz's work on human decision systems, enterprise data, ML-enabled products, and complex digital ecosystems.
His earlier career is relevant foundation, not unrelated legacy experience.
The common thread is turning complexity into usable intelligence and measurable outcomes.
proof_points: Large-scale interaction and product architecture at Ogilvy, Publicis, Mediacorp, Manulife, and Maybank.
ML UX practices and pilots at Manulife and Maybank–Ageas Etiqa.
Current Agentic AI, RAG, financial agents, spatial AI, context engineering, and governance focus.
